languages.text: "Войска готовы к высадке. Я приму командование и отобью мелкие поселения, а вы, Ваша Светлость, направляйтесь в Клеть. Губернатор должен обладать всей полнотой тактической информации".

"The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."
languages.original_text: "Войска готовы к высадке. Я приму командование и отобью мелкие поселения, а вы, Ваша Светлость, направляйтесь в Клеть. Губернатор должен обладать всей полнотой тактической информации".

"The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

languages.text: "Die Truppen stehen zur Entsendung bereit. Ich werde die Befreiung der kleineren Siedlungen überwachen. Geht Ihr zum Käfig, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} — {nc|die Gouverneurin|der Gouverneur} braucht alle taktischen Informationen."
languages.original_text: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

traits.locale_text: "Die Truppen stehen zur Entsendung bereit. Ich werde die Befreiung der kleineren Siedlungen überwachen. Geht Ihr zum Käfig, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} — {nc|die Gouverneurin|der Gouverneur} braucht alle taktischen Informationen."

languages.text: « Les troupes sont prêtes à être déployées. Je superviserai la libération des petites colonies. Votre Seigneurie, je vous suggère de rejoindre la Cage. Le gouverneur pourra davantage faire état de la situation. »
languages.original_text: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

traits.locale_text: « Les troupes sont prêtes à être déployées. Je superviserai la libération des petites colonies. Votre Seigneurie, je vous suggère de rejoindre la Cage. Le gouverneur pourra davantage faire état de la situation. »

languages.text: “部队已整装待发，随时可以调遣。我会负责次要定居点的解放行动。而大人您，应前往牢笼——总督手中必定有完整的战术情报。”
languages.original_text: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

traits.locale_text: “部队已整装待发，随时可以调遣。我会负责次要定居点的解放行动。而大人您，应前往牢笼——总督手中必定有完整的战术情报。”

languages.text: «Las tropas están listas para su despliegue. Supervisaré la liberación de los asentamientos menores. Usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}, debería dirigirse a la Jaula; {nc|la gobernadora|el gobernador} dispondrá de toda la información táctica».
languages.original_text: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

traits.locale_text: «Las tropas están listas para su despliegue. Supervisaré la liberación de los asentamientos menores. Usted, mi{mf|lord|lady}, debería dirigirse a la Jaula; {nc|la gobernadora|el gobernador} dispondrá de toda la información táctica».

languages.text: "軍隊は下船準備が整った。私が指揮を執り、小さな集落を撃退する。陛下はクリータスに向かえ。総督は全戦術情報を把握しているはずです"
languages.original_text: "The troops are ready to disembark. I'll take command and beat back the small settlements, and you, Your Grace, head for Cleetus. The governor must have full tactical information."

languages.text: "Birlikler konuşlanmaya hazır. Küçük yerleşimlerin kurtarılmasına ben nezaret edeceğim. Siz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Kafes'e gitmelisiniz. Validen tam taktiksel istihbaratı alabilirsiniz."
languages.original_text: "The troops stand ready for deployment. I will oversee the liberation of the minor settlements. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, should head for the Cage — the governor must have the complete tactical intelligence."

traits.locale_text: "Birlikler konuşlanmaya hazır. Küçük yerleşimlerin kurtarılmasına ben nezaret edeceğim. Siz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Kafes'e gitmelisiniz. Validen tam taktiksel istihbaratı alabilirsiniz."
